name: groundcrew-cli
description: CLI companion for Groundcrew — queue tasks, send feedback, monitor your Copilot agent from another terminal.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' > dist/_tmp.js && echo "import{createRequire}from'module';const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);" >> dist/_tmp.js && cat dist/index.js >> dist/_tmp.js && mv dist/_tmp.js dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js

author: jellythomas
